title: Ceased or suspended Authorised Corporate Service Providers (ACSPs)
body: "We suspend the status of an ACSP if we are investigating, or have asked them to provide more information about their:     business or Anti-Money Laundering (AML) supervision  filings with Companies House  identity verification process (if they have verified someone’s identity for Companies House)    We cease (remove) the status of an ACSP if they:     tell us they no longer want to be registered  do not comply with legal requirements    This list is updated with any changes every 2 weeks. If an ACSP has been ceased or suspended recently, it could take up to 2 weeks to be added to the list. If there have been no changes to the list, we will not publish an update. "
